name: Chéri
promoText: Arabic fine dining · Gewan Island · Reserve your table · cheribistro.qa
headline: Good food, good mood
bio: A new wave of fine dining on Gewan Island — timeless ambiance, bespoke flavor, and beachfront.
tagline: A new wave of fine dining on Gewan Island — timeless ambiance, bespoke flavor, and beachfront dining with authentic Arabic cuisine.
storyTitle: Crafted with passion, served with soul
storyText: Chéri brings a new wave of fine dining to Gewan Island. Expect timeless ambiance, bespoke flavors, and a stunning beachfront setting — where authentic Arabic cuisine meets refined hospitality.

menuItems.name: سلايدر اللحم بالجبن
menuItems.description: Slow-roasted chicken with herbs and sides

menuItems.name: طبق المزة المشكّل
menuItems.description: Golden fritters with chutney and fresh herbs

chefSpecial.name: كبسة
chefSpecial.description: Aromatic spiced rice with tender meat — a Gulf classic and Chéri signature.

testimonial.quote: Chéri never disappoints! Impeccable service and delicious dishes every single visit.
testimonial.author: Khalid Al-Mansouri
